title: omp manifest.json
description: File & dataset inventory for a project folder. Metadata-only: omp NEVER copies/moves/pushes the actual data — it records checksum, size, split, and lineage so changes are detectable and provenance is traceable. If DVC/git-lfs manages the data, omp defers and mirrors metadata only. omp NEVER claims ownership of out-of-tree runtime artifacts (Docker images, registry tags); those are referenced via docker_images (external reference) only, not datasets[].

generated.description: ISO timestamp this manifest was last written.

managed_by_external.description: If a versioning tool (DVC, git-lfs) is detected, record it here. omp then only mirrors metadata and does not claim ownership.

path.description: Relative path to the data file.

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the file (hashlib, deterministic across OS). 'UNHASHED' allowed for files too large to hash on registration (size+mtime tracked instead).

rows.description: Optional row count for tabular data.

split.description: Train/val/test split membership, to detect leakage across splits.

group.description: Split-group id; siblings sharing a group are one split set.

lineage.description: Where this data came from and how it was produced.

added.description: ISO date registered into the manifest.

docker_images.description: Optional inventory of Docker images this project builds. NOT datasets[] — an image has no in-tree path and no file-content SHA-256, so it is recorded as an external reference. omp NEVER claims ownership of out-of-tree runtime artifacts; size/digest are daemon-dependent and nullable. audit does NOT assert drift on these (a remote digest is un-rehashable).

ref.description: Image reference w/o tag, e.g. '${REGISTRY}/sensor-dev-ros2-humble'. Templated — no hardcoded registry.

compose.description: Relative path to the compose file.

size.description: Daemon-read size; null if not queried.

digest.description: Daemon-read digest; null if not queried.
